iottwinmaker.syncjob.SyncRole.Description: The SyncJob IAM role. This IAM role is used by the sync job to read from the syncSource, and create, update or delete the corresponding resources.

iottwinmaker.syncjob.SyncSource.Description: The sync source.  Currently the only supported syncSoucre is `SITEWISE`.

iottwinmaker.syncjob.Tags.Description: Metadata you can use to manage the SyncJob.

iottwinmaker.syncjob.WorkspaceId.Description: The ID of the workspace that contains the sync job.
